title: Aurora, 33930, Palm Pals Maestro Grasshopper 5In, Soft Toy, Green
features: Meet the Palm Pals Maestro Grasshopper Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's beloved Palm Pals Collection. This cute green plush grasshopper is filled with beans and fits perfectly in the palm of your hand. It's perfect for cuddling and makes a great gift for any occasion!

The Maestro Grasshopper is part of the Palm Pals Critters collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Maestro Grasshopper measures 13cm. There's a new orchestra leader in the meadow, Maestro Grasshopper uses his long legs to create moving melodies that resonate through the fields. His antennae catch every subtle harmony of the natural world, from the rustling leaves to the singing winds, crafting lively symphonies! This cute artist Maestro Grasshopper will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
